# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:latest

# Install necessary packages
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    postgresql postgresql-contrib \
    redis-server

# Setup web server
RUN echo "daemon off;" >> /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
COPY ./web /var/www/html

# Setup API server
RUN pip3 install flask
COPY ./api /usr/src/api
WORKDIR /usr/src/api

# Setup database
USER postgres
RUN /etc/init.d/postgresql start && \
    psql --command "CREATE USER dev WITH SUPERUSER PASSWORD 'devpass';" && \
    createdb -O dev devdb
USER root
COPY ./db /usr/src/db

# Startup script
COPY ./entrypoint.sh /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh
RUN chmod +x /usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

# Entry point
CMD ["/usr/local/bin/entrypoint.sh"]
